display.purpose: Hero headers and high-level summary metrics.

body.purpose: Standard text descriptions, logs, list items.

label.purpose: Form field headers, eyebrows, and stats identifiers.

shadows.name: shadow-floating
shadows.purpose: Permitted exclusively for temporary, floating bottom sheets.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with standard height and padding.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0800FF; color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; font-weight: 700; font-family: sans-serif; border: none; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input-text { background: #FCFAF6; color: #241C18; border: 1px solid #C5BAAE; border-radius: 8px; height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 16px; outline: none; } .ds-input-text:focus { border-color: #0800FF; }

narrative.overview: The Sculpted Ledger represents the fusion of an analog, high-craft physical logbook with the absolute precision of a digital tracking system. It is designed for heavy gym trainees who metrically analyze their workouts and diet daily. The interface feels solid, reliable, and grounded.
keyCharacteristics: Mineral Warm Palette: Built on soft earth/warm neutral surfaces with a sharp blue focus/active color.
Flat-By-Default Layering: Hierarchy is communicated by nested color layers instead of drop shadows.
Data Density with Dignity: Metrics are presented cleanly in structured grids and lists.
Extreme Touch Feasibility: Touch targets exceed 44px for easy interaction during heavy physical strain.

rules.name: The Blue-First Active Rule
rules.body: The primary color for all interactive states, focused states, selection, and the protein macro is Mineral Blue. Olive is deprecated and strictly forbidden.

rules.name: The Restrained Intensity Rule
rules.body: Brand colors should occupy <=10% of any given screen surface. Visual strength comes from restraint.

rules.name: The Clean Grotesque Rule
rules.body: No serif headings or decorative handwriting fonts. Use structured Helvetica variations to convey stability and focus.

rules.name: The Layer-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth is created through contrasting surface tones rather than box shadows. Drop shadows are prohibited for static cards, buttons, or list items.

dos: Do use strict semantic Tailwind/NativeWind tokens (e.g., bg-surface, text-error) for all visual elements.
Do group related metrics inside a structured 4-column layout with gap-content-gap (16px) or gap-section-gap (32px).
Do verify contrast limits (body text must be at least 4.5:1 against the underlying surface).
Do use ReanimatedSwipeable and expo-haptics for any interactive row gestures (e.g., deleting a food log).
donts: Don't use arbitrary Tailwind utility overrides (bg-blue-500, text-red-400 or custom inline colors).
Don't use decorative sketch/doodle SVGs or hand-drawn borders.
Don't use side-stripe borders (e.g. colored left-borders on cards or alerts).
Don't pair borders with wide drop shadows (no ghost-cards).
Don't use gradient text under any circumstance.
Don't use uppercase, widely tracked eyebrows on every section by reflex.
